product_highlights: MitoGrow™ — Wharton's jelly MSC-derived exosomes for hair and scalp regeneration
SkinRevive™ Exosome Serum — clinical-grade MSC exosome preparation for aesthetic protocols
High-purity exosome isolation via size-exclusion chromatography (SEC)
Particle count characterization by NTA (nanoparticle tracking analysis) for each lot
notes: Kimera Labs is a US-based biotechnology company specializing in the production of clinical-grade exosomes derived from Wharton's jelly mesenchymal stem cells (WJ-MSCs) for professional aesthetic and regenerative medicine applications. Their rigorous cGMP manufacturing and NTA-based quality control provides the exosome concentration and characterization data required by clinical practitioners and cosmetic formulators. Kimera's MitoGrow™ platform for hair and scalp regeneration via MSC exosomes is a compelling entry point for SKIN-TWIN's hair-related biotech intelligence.
